title: ligularia lapathifolia
intro: Ligularia lapathifolia, also known as Chinese dragon flower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its large, showy flowers and distinctive leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Ligularia lapathifolia include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, improving respiratory function, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, or used as a tincture or dried extract to harness its medicinal properties.
